raw_consumer_statement: I applied for a Barclays XXXX XXXX credit card with the purpose of transferring {$12000.00} from my XXXX credit card to the Barclays card. I was only approved for a {$2000.00} credit line for the card. I was under the assumption that since I was not approved for the full {$12000.00} that I would have to worry about the transfer but unfortunately Barclay submitted a transfer of less than the requested amount with my knowledge or approval.
